data.body: STATE: CLOSED + green. Change 660 Verified+1 + LLM-Review+1; completion-verifier signed. Discovered-work keystone (owner-approved Option A): op-cert DSSE envelope stored on a ticket by extending the SIGNATURE record (git-gpgsig-style additive), NOT a new event type. signing.sign_opcert_manifest (producer) + reducer process_signature present-only fold + opcert.opcert_from_record (read). Rollout note in opcert.py docstring (op-cert events unverifiable on pre-upgrade clones; upgrade verify hosts first). Held-out TDD (compaction survival, HMAC->None, additive invariance) + mutation-checked. Ready to submit.
